mapper.sql: select story_id, story_code, story_label, story_title, story_sub_title, story_quote, story_summary, cover_image, story_sort, publish_status, story_status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at from cafe_brand_story
mapper.select: where story_id = #{storyId} and delete_at IS NULL
mapper.insert:
insert into cafe_brand_story
story_code, story_label, story_title, story_sub_title, story_quote, story_summary, cover_image, story_sort, publish_status, story_status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at,
#{storyCode}, #{storyLabel}, #{storyTitle}, #{storySubTitle}, #{storyQuote}, #{storySummary}, #{coverImage}, #{storySort}, #{publishStatus}, #{storyStatus}, #{publishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteAt},

values

story_code, story_label, story_title, story_sub_title, story_quote, story_summary, cover_image, story_sort, publish_status, story_status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_at,
values

)
mapper.update:
update cafe_brand_story
story_code = #{storyCode}, story_label = #{storyLabel}, story_title = #{storyTitle}, story_sub_title = #{storySubTitle}, story_quote = #{storyQuote}, story_summary = #{storySummary}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, story_sort = #{storySort}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, story_status = #{storyStatus}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_at = #{deleteAt},
where story_id = #{storyId} and delete_at IS NULL

update.foreach:
update cafe_brand_story
story_code = #{item.storyCode}, story_label = #{item.storyLabel}, story_title = #{item.storyTitle}, story_sub_title = #{item.storySubTitle}, story_quote = #{item.storyQuote}, story_summary = #{item.storySummary}, cover_image = #{item.coverImage}, story_sort = #{item.storySort}, publish_status = #{item.publishStatus}, story_status = #{item.storyStatus}, publish_time = #{item.publishTime}, create_by = #{item.createBy}, create_time = #{item.createTime}, update_by = #{item.updateBy}, update_time = #{item.updateTime}, delete_at = #{item.deleteAt},
where story_id = #{item.storyId} and delete_at IS NULL

mapper.update: update cafe_brand_story set delete_at = now() where story_id = #{storyId} and delete_at IS NULL
